summary: Horizontal video, a rebroadcast Fox News segment featuring an anchor and Dallas reporter Brooke Taylor, with FOX NEWS ALERT chyrons, covering the arrest of a Texas man for threatening ICE agents and Secretary Noem. It is a TV news clip with no music.
notable_text: DHS: TX MAN ARRESTED FOR THREATENING I.C.E. & NOEM; TIKTOK USER URGES PEOPLE TO 'SHOOT AT I.C.E.'; FOX NEWS ALERT
